description: Science family submission system used for Science, Science Advances, Science Translational Medicine, Science Immunology, Science Signaling, and Science Robotics (AAAS).
step_by_step: 2. Select target journal and manuscript type
3. Upload manuscript as a SINGLE PDF for initial review (figures + legends embedded)
4. Enter structured abstract (≤ 125 words, one paragraph)
5. Enter Impact Statement (one sentence, ≤ 100 characters) — editorial assessment only
6. Upload Supplementary Materials as a single PDF
7. Upload each figure as separate high-res TIFF for production
8. Add all author information and ORCID
10. Submit — you receive a manuscript ID
11. For revisions: address all reviewer comments in a separate response document
common_errors: Main manuscript not a single PDF → Science requires PDF for initial review
Abstract > 125 words → system flags on submission
Supplementary as multiple files → should be single PDF labelled 'Supplementary Materials'
Figure legends not in main PDF → editors need legends for review

file_requirements.main_document: Single PDF (MS + figure legends + references embedded)
file_requirements.figures: High-res TIFF for production; also embedded in submission PDF
file_requirements.cover_letter: Enter in text box on submission form
